new_fixes_this_run.description: Gate 1a: BTC minimum stop width 0.8%. Rejects BTC signals with stop_width_pct < 0.008. 47/47 BTC losses were instant SL hits at avg 0.494% stop. Confidence=0.80.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: Eliminates the single biggest BTC loss bucket (instant SL hits on sub-0.8% stops). Expected: -40 to -80 avoided losses/month on BTC.

new_fixes_this_run.description: Gate 1h: consecutive-loss streak penalty. -15 confidence points if consecutive_losses >= 2. Reads from self.risk_mgr.consecutive_losses directly. Confidence=0.90.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: On restart with 4 consecutive losses, any signal entering Gate 1h gets -15pts confidence before circuit breaker at loss #5. Prevents loss-amplification feedback.

reason_no_additional_fixes: CONF_70_80_GENERAL_PENALIZE: Deferred — still needs symbol+regime breakdown from 20+ live trades. Would double-penalize BTC_SHORT 70-80% (btc_short_conf70_80_penalize_v1 already active).
HYPE_UNKNOWN_REGIME_EXCEPTION: n=6 too small. Direction unverified.
CONF_FLOOR_70_RULE_CONFLICT: Conflict between insight_journal (+.19/trade EV) and runtime rule (-321 total). Human decision needed.
pending_human_review: CONF_FLOOR_70_RULE_CONFLICT — suspend rule pending live re-evaluation?
SOL_SHORT_SUSPENSION — #1 historical alpha (+$5807, 63.7% WR). Allow 50% gate probe or maintain full block?
